name: Berry Berry Festival
short_description: A wholesome and heart-warming story game about a young girl who wants to become the Berry Berry Champion. Explore a small town and help the residents with odd jobs to prepare for the Berry Berry Festival!
detailed_description:
Sophie is a young girl living in the small town, Ortgaurd. Once a year, the town holds a festival to celebrate the community they have built. To keep the children busy while the adults are setting up the festival, all of the kids are tasked with finding as many berries as they can for the Berry Berry Harvest Competition.

You'll also get to know the residents of Ortgaurd, as they ask for Sophie's help with a variety of strange missions. Will Sophie be able to save the day and find enough berries to win the Berry Berry Harvest Competition?

Playtime: 1-2 hours. Perfect for playing in one sitting and getting fully immersed in the story.
